overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person perspective driving through neon-lit city streets, passing a Ferris wheel and various commercial buildings, then transitioning to walking through a bustling outdoor market with food stalls and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with commercial buildings and crosswalk

agents.ego_description: driving slowly through city street at night, approaching an intersection with a large Ferris wheel visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car parked on the side of the street

entered.detail: large illuminated Ferris wheel structure visible against the night sky
commercial building with G AND IMPERIAL signage and neon lighting
painted yellow pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt road
tall street lamp illuminating the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The video opens on a dark city street at night, with a large Ferris wheel glowing in the distance to the left. The camera moves forward past a crosswalk, with a commercial building featuring 'G AND IMPERIAL' signage on the right and a yellow sports car parked along the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with restaurants and gas station

events.description: passing pizza restaurant with prominent FUCK A SLICE signage on the left
approaching gas station area with distinctive blue dome structure

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past various storefronts and parked vehicles, approaching an underpass

entered.detail: restaurant with illuminated FUCK A SLICE signage and fire barrels burning outside
blue dome structure of a gas station with bright lighting
tall building covered in vertical neon advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The camera drives past a pizza shop with bold signage on the left, while the yellow sports car falls behind. The scene opens up toward a gas station with a blue dome on the right, and a tall building covered in vertical neon ads becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: area beneath elevated highway with parking structure

events.description: entering area beneath elevated highway overpass with reduced lighting
turning right toward open plaza area with returning view of Ferris wheel

agents.ego_description: driving under the concrete overpass and turning toward a plaza area with street vendors

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure overhead blocking the sky
multi-story parking structure with horizontal concrete lines
large Ferris wheel structure reappearing on the right side
small vendor stalls and kiosks along the street edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, entering a darker, sheltered area with a parking garage on the left. As the camera turns right, the Ferris wheel reappears in the distance, and small street vendor stalls become visible along the roadside.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor market plaza with food vendors and seating

events.description: exiting vehicle and entering market plaza on foot, navigating through outdoor seating
approaching large vertical billboard and dense food stall area with steam rising

agents.ego_description: walking through the market plaza on foot, passing food stalls and outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: person standing near food stall in the distance

entered.detail: tall vertical billboard displaying advertisement with number 97 and figure
colorful vendor stalls with umbrellas and bright signage
plastic chairs and tables arranged for dining with steam rising
neon sign for Brooklyn Barista coffee shop with pink lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to walking and enters an open market plaza filled with food stalls and outdoor seating. A massive vertical billboard dominates the center view, while the Ferris wheel grows larger on the right. The Brooklyn Barista shop glows with pink neon on the left as the camera navigates between tables and chairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense market area with multiple vendors and pedestrians

events.description: entering denser crowd area with multiple pedestrians gathered near stalls
slowing down near group of people gathered by market booth

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow market pathways between stalls and groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and conversing near market stall
person sweeping or cleaning near the street edge

entered.detail: small enclosed vendor booth with person inside and various goods
large satellite dish mounted on top of market structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the market, navigating through narrow pathways lined with vendor stalls on both sides. Several pedestrians are gathered near a market booth on the right, while a person sweeps the area on the left. The environment is dense with market structures and neon signage, creating an enclosed atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit metropolis that transforms from a wide-open drive along city streets into an intimate walk through a dense outdoor market. It begins by moving past a glowing distant Ferris wheel and a yellow sports car parked near commercial signage, before driving past a pizza shop toward a blue-domed gas station and towering neon advertisements. The scene then shifts as the camera glides beneath a massive elevated highway overpass into a sheltered area, turning right to reveal street vendor stalls as the Ferris wheel reappears. As the motion transitions from driving to walking, the camera enters an open market plaza dominated by a massive vertical billboard and the pink neon glow of the Brooklyn Barista. Finally, the environment closes in as the camera navigates narrow pathways lined with food stalls and pedestrians, ending in a dense atmosphere of market structures and vibrant signage.
